data.name: Hentai Reina
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Reina — a game for true fans of anime erotica and seductive puzzles

Hentai Reina is an interactive adult game that combines logic, attention, and a sexy atmosphere. You will meet the attractive and confident Reina — a hot police girl who gradually reveals more of her charm as you complete levels.

🔹 Game features:

Two mini-games in one level:

First — a classic memory game: flip the tiles and find matching pairs.

Then — a puzzle featuring Reina’s image, which must be completed right after the memory game.

After completing both mini-games, a full spicy image of Reina is revealed.

Plenty of levels to complete:
24 levels in each mini-game — 48 exciting stages in total.

Progress reveals more:
the further you advance, the more revealing and seductive Reina becomes.

Game progression:

Achievements for dedicated players.

Gallery for viewing unlocked images.

Three difficulty modes: easy, normal, and hard — choose your own pace.

Hentai Reina is an adult puzzle game that combines relaxing gameplay with erotic rewards. Complete levels, unlock new scenes, and enjoy every step together with the sexy and charming police girl Reina.

data.short_description: Hentai Reina is an adult game about a sexy police girl. Unlock new revealing illustrations, complete levels, earn achievements, and enjoy hot content in the gallery.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Quad-core processor with 3.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1050 or AMD Radeon RX 560 with 4 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 11 or newer
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
